name: cc-lab-project
description: Welcome to the Cloud Computing Load Balancer Simulator!

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start-worker1" "npm run start-worker2" "npm run start-worker3" "npm run start-lb" "npm run start-frontend"
scripts.start-worker1: cd worker-node && set PORT=5001 && npm start
scripts.start-worker2: cd worker-node && set PORT=5002 && npm start
scripts.start-worker3: cd worker-node && set PORT=5003 && npm start
